NAME: BBJ — Whole-exome sequencing & rare variant analysis
DESCRIPTION: Whole-exome sequencing of BBJ participants enabling rare variant association studies. Demonstrated expanded cancer risk profiles for BRCA1/BRCA2 pathogenic variants in the Japanese population, revealing population-specific pathogenic variant frequencies.
TITLE: Expansion of Cancer Risk Profile for BRCA1 and BRCA2 Pathogenic Variants
